operator_instances.transformation_goal: Increase data complexity by using compartment IDs with special characters (e.g., slashes) that must be correctly included in reaction IDs.
operator_instances.rationale: The seed uses simple compartment IDs like 'c1'. This operator introduces IDs with path-like format (e.g., 'c1/peroxisome') to test robustness of ID string handling in reaction name generation. The gold solution uses f-string formatting directly and will still work, but the diversity of IDs increases data processing complexity.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the solution correctly handles compartment IDs that contain special characters like slashes.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Reaction IDs must preserve the exact compartment ID string (including special characters) as part of the reaction name.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: A naive solution that strips or transforms compartment IDs would produce incorrect reaction names.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Create a model with compartments having IDs containing slashes and verify that the generated reaction IDs contain the exact slash-containing IDs.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a model where compartment IDs contain slashes and verify reaction IDs match expected pattern.
